summary: wallet-agent-ai exfiltrates data to hardcoded Telegram bot endpoint
details: dist/agent.js contains a hardcoded outbound POST to api.telegram.org (a Telegram bot sendMessage endpoint) co-located with reads from process.env. The pattern — fetch() + POST + api.telegram.org/bot<token>/sendMessage + process.env — matches the canonical Telegram-bot exfiltration channel used to siphon installer-side environment variables and wallet-related data through an attacker-controlled Telegram bot. The package presents itself as a wallet AI agent, which makes the unconditional Telegram beacon a credible exfiltration path for wallet keys, API credentials, or other secrets accessible at runtime.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
